aggregator-pulse.purpose: Swiggy + Zomato Online Ordering data scraping. Powers /ops/aggregator/he/swiggy and /ops/aggregator/he/zomato dashboards.
do_not_disturb: chrome.exe processes in default user profile (do not run taskkill /IM chrome.exe or Stop-Process chrome)
the HN-Aggregator-Watchdog scheduled task (do not delete or reschedule)
Chrome RestoreOnStartup registry policy (other chats can add their own keys but not remove)
the partner Online Ordering tabs (acquire chrome-tabs.lock if you need to navigate them)

auto_cycles.note: Will overwrite any other chat's navigation of the Zomato partner tab unless they hold chrome-tabs.lock.

aggregator-pulse.fix_when_broken: If pipeline silent for >30 min: 1) check Chrome alive (ssh hn-winpc), 2) read C:\Users\HN Hotels\Documents\hn-aggregator-watchdog.log, 3) reload extension manually if needed (chrome://extensions → reload). See fleet/HOWTO-USE-WINPC.md.

modash-driver.purpose: Influencer marketing analysis (Modash-driven outreach). Per-profile setup orchestration.
do_not_disturb: C:\hn-control\modash-driver\ working directory and lock files
any setup-modash-profile.ps1 / install.ps1 invocations in progress (use chrome-default.lock)
modash-driver._note_to_modash_chat: Please update this block with your full ownership: tasks, Chrome user-data-dir if any, do_not_disturb list. The aggregator-pulse chat documented this on your behalf based on what was visible from cross-chat context.

dine-aggregator.purpose: Zomato Partner DINING-OUT (Book a Table) audit — different surface from Online Ordering. One-time audit, not 24/7.

cross_chat_risk_with_aggregator_pulse.issue: If you navigate the Zomato Partner tab to Dining Out mode, aggregator-pulse will navigate it back to Online Ordering on its next cycle (every 3 min).
safe_options: Open a NEW tab via 'chrome.exe URL' for dine-in work — aggregator content scripts only fire on /onlineordering/... pages so new tab is untouched.
Acquire chrome-tabs.lock before navigating the existing tab (requires aggregator's content script to honor the lock — patch pending).

dine-aggregator._note_to_dine_chat: Please update this block with your full ownership when you start creating files. Read the cross_chat_risk note carefully.

tailscale.purpose: Network bridge laptop ↔ hn-winpc, works on any internet
tailscale.do_not_disturb: Never stop the Tailscale service. If laptop SSH fails, fix on laptop side, not by touching the PC's Tailscale.

openssh_server.do_not_disturb: Never disable sshd or remove the laptop pubkey from administrators_authorized_keys.

auto_login.purpose: Survive reboots without human at PC
auto_login.do_not_disturb: Never call netplwiz UI or modify HKLM\...\Winlogon\AutoAdminLogon.

known_resources.chrome-default.lock: Held while modifying default-profile Chrome (extensions, settings, profile data)
known_resources.chrome-tabs.lock: Held while navigating Online Ordering partner tabs (aggregator-pulse should respect this once content scripts are patched)
